title: Justicia para Alan
overview: Peruvian documentary film written and directed by Ernesto Carlín. The film narrates the last months of the life of twice democratically elected president Alan García Pérez and analyzes the circumstances of his painful departure. The film didn't have financing from the Peruvian State.
